name: Readcrest Capital AG
summary: Readcrest Capital AG does not have significant business operations. Previously, the company was engaged in outdoor advertising, and organizing of trade fairs and exhibitions. The company was formerly known as Enerxy AG and changed its name to Readcrest Capital AG in March 2017. Readcrest Capital AG is headquartered in Hamburg, Germany. Readcrest Capital AG operates under a plan of liquidation that was approved in January 2015.
